_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: MEFs lacking Rabl6 displayed higher p16 expression at an earlier passage compared to the later induction observed in wildtype counterparts
